prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Body mass index category: Overweight
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.4 kg; Height 166.7 cm; BMI 23.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.3%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 221mg/dL; 9 months ago 197mg/dL; 6 months ago 214mg/dL; 3 months ago 172mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.2kg; 9 months ago 67.2kg; 6 months ago 65.7kg; 3 months ago 66.1kg; current 66.4kg), Height (12 months ago 166.7cm; 9 months ago 166.7cm; 6 months ago 166.7cm; 3 months ago 166.7cm; current 166.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 23.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 67mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 93mL/min/1.73m²; current 94mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 104mg/g; 9 months ago 83mg/g; 6 months ago 80mg/g; 3 months ago 84mg/g; current 89mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 106mg/dL; 9 months ago 128mg/dL; 6 months ago 125mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.4g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.7g/dL; 3 months ago 15.3g/dL; current 14.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
